tasks.subject: Task 1: Drive-temperature parser (lib.ReadDiskTemps)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A standalone, fixture-testable parser of disks.ini returning each disk's temperature and spun-down state.

**Files:**
- Create: daemon/lib/disktemp.go
- Test: daemon/lib/disktemp_test.go

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ReadDiskTempsFromFile(path) parses section headers ["disk1"] -> ID disk1, plus device= and temp=.
- temp="*" or empty -> SpunDown:true, TempC:0. Numeric -> SpunDown:false.
- Missing file -> non-nil error AND non-nil (empty) map.
- ReadDiskTemps() reads /boot/config/disks.ini via const default path.

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/lib/ -run TestReadDiskTemps -v -> PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/lib/disktemp.go", "daemon/lib/disktemp_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/lib/ -run TestReadDiskTemps -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parses section header to ID + device + temp", "temp=* or empty -> SpunDown true", "missing file -> error + non-nil map", "ReadDiskTemps() uses /boot/config/disks.ini"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: hwmon temp-sensor discovery (lib.DiscoverHwmonTempSensors)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Enumerate every hwmon tempN_input with path, label, value, and a plausibility flag (implausible/unreliable flagged, not hidden).

**Files:**
- Modify: daemon/lib/hwmon.go
- Test: daemon/lib/hwmon_test.go

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- One entry per readable hwmon*/tempN_input with Path, Label, TempC, Plausible.
- Plausible false for IsPlausibleTempC failures OR unreliable label; entry still returned.
- Reuses HwmonBasePath, MaxHwmonDevices, ReadSysfsInt, ReadSysfsString, IsPlausibleTempC, isUnreliableTempLabel.

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/lib/ -run TestDiscoverHwmonTempSensors -v -> PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/lib/hwmon.go", "daemon/lib/hwmon_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/lib/ -run TestDiscoverHwmonTempSensors -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["one entry per readable tempN_input with path/label/value/plausible", "unreliable label or out-of-range flagged Plausible=false but included", "reuses existing hwmon constants and helpers"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: DTOs + validation for temperature sources
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define FanTempSource, catalog DTOs, extend FanDevice and FanProfileRequest, add source validation.

**Files:**
- Modify: daemon/dto/fan.go
- Modify: daemon/lib/validation.go
- Test: daemon/lib/validation_test.go

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- FanTempSource{Type,SensorPath,DriveIDs,FallbackSensorPath} + FanTempSourceType consts (hwmon, drives).
- FanDevice.TempSource *FanTempSource (omitempty); FanProfileRequest.Source *FanTempSource.
- FanSensorCatalog, AvailableTempSensor, AvailableDriveSensor.
- ValidateFanTempSource rejects unknown Type, drives with empty DriveIDs, paths not under /sys/class/hwmon/ or with ..

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/lib/ -run TestValidateFanTempSource -v -> PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/dto/fan.go", "daemon/lib/validation.go", "daemon/lib/validation_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/lib/ -run TestValidateFanTempSource -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["FanTempSource + FanTempSourceType consts", "FanDevice.TempSource and FanProfileRequest.Source added", "catalog DTOs added", "ValidateFanTempSource rejects bad type/empty drives/bad path"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Curve engine — drive provider, resolveTemp, fallback
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Curve engine resolves a FanTempSource (hwmon or max-of-active-drives) with per-profile fallback and log-once-per-transition; all callers updated.

**Files:**
- Modify: daemon/services/controllers/fan_curves.go
- Modify: daemon/services/controllers/fan.go
- Test: daemon/services/controllers/fan_curves_test.go

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- fanCurveAssignment {ProfileName string; Source dto.FanTempSource} with json tags profile_name/source.
- AssignProfile(fanID, profileName string, source dto.FanTempSource); all callers updated.
- FanCurveEngine has injected DriveTempProvider; default backed by lib.ReadDiskTemps.
- resolveTemp primary->fallback->(0,false); drives = max of active+plausible.
- resolveTempForFan logs spun-down->fallback transition once (recovery once).
- GetAssignmentSource; GetStatus populates FanDevice.TempSource + (hwmon) TempSensorPath.

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/services/controllers/ -v -> PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/services/controllers/fan_curves.go", "daemon/services/controllers/fan.go", "daemon/services/controllers/fan_curves_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/services/controllers/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fanCurveAssignment{ProfileName,Source} with json tags", "AssignProfile takes dto.FanTempSource, callers updated", "DriveTempProvider injected, default via lib.ReadDiskTemps", "resolveTemp primary->fallback->no-reading; drives max-of-active", "fallback transition logged once", "GetAssignmentSource + GetStatus populate TempSource"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Config persistence migration (legacy -> Source)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Load existing fancontrol.json (old flat {ProfileName,TempSensorPath}) into the new Source shape; save in the new shape.

**Files:**
- Modify: daemon/services/controllers/fan_config.go
- Test: daemon/services/controllers/fan_config_test.go

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Legacy {"ProfileName":"balanced","TempSensorPath":"/sys/.../temp1_input"} -> Source{Type:hwmon,SensorPath:...}.
- New-shape {"profile_name":...,"source":{"type":"drives","drive_ids":["disk1"]}} parses unchanged.
- Save then Load round-trips a drives source.

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/services/controllers/ -run TestFanConfig -v -> PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/services/controllers/fan_config.go", "daemon/services/controllers/fan_config_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/services/controllers/ -run TestFanConfig -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["legacy flat assignment migrates to hwmon Source", "new-shape assignment parses unchanged", "Save/Load round-trips a drives source"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: REST — GET /fans/sensors + source-aware assign
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose the discovery endpoint and accept a Source (or legacy temp_sensor_path) on profile assignment, validated.

**Files:**
- Modify: daemon/services/controllers/fan.go
- Modify: daemon/services/api/handlers.go
- Modify: daemon/services/api/server.go
- Test: daemon/services/api/fan_sensors_test.go

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- GET /api/v1/fans/sensors returns dto.FanSensorCatalog (200) with hwmon_sensors and drives arrays.
- POST /fans/profile with source validates via lib.ValidateFanTempSource (400 invalid) and assigns; legacy temp_sensor_path synthesizes hwmon source.
- FanController.SetProfile(fanID, profileName string, source dto.FanTempSource); GetSensorCatalog from lib.DiscoverHwmonTempSensors + lib.ReadDiskTemps.

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/services/api/ -run 'TestFanSensors|TestSetFanProfileSource' -v -> PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/services/controllers/fan.go", "daemon/services/api/handlers.go", "daemon/services/api/server.go", "daemon/services/api/fan_sensors_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/services/api/ -run 'TestFanSensors|TestSetFanProfileSource' -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET /fans/sensors returns FanSensorCatalog 200", "POST /fans/profile validates source (400 invalid) + legacy path synth", "SetProfile takes dto.FanTempSource; GetSensorCatalog implemented"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: MCP — get_fan_sensors tool + source-aware set_fan_profile
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add read-only get_fan_sensors MCP tool and extend set_fan_profile to accept a structured source (still accepts legacy temp_sensor_path).

**Files:**
- Modify: daemon/dto/mcp.go
- Modify: daemon/services/mcp/server.go
- Test: daemon/services/mcp/fan_sensors_test.go

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- MCPFanProfileArgs gains SourceType, DriveIDs, FallbackSensorPath (omitempty) with jsonschema.
- set_fan_profile builds dto.FanTempSource (drives->DriveIDs+fallback; else hwmon path) and validates via lib.ValidateFanTempSource.
- get_fan_sensors (ReadOnlyHint) returns FanController.GetSensorCatalog() JSON.
- Test asserts get_fan_sensors registered.

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/services/mcp/ -v -> PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/dto/mcp.go", "daemon/services/mcp/server.go", "daemon/services/mcp/fan_sensors_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/services/mcp/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["MCPFanProfileArgs gains SourceType/DriveIDs/FallbackSensorPath", "set_fan_profile builds+validates FanTempSource", "get_fan_sensors registered ReadOnly returning catalog", "test asserts get_fan_sensors registered"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Full-suite, hardware verify, CodeRabbit, CHANGELOG
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove the feature works end-to-end on the live Unraid server and record it in the changelog.

> USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE. Close only after every acceptanceCriteria item is re-validated independently, with output captured.

**Files:**
- Modify: CHANGELOG.md

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- go test ./... passes and make local builds (regenerated swagger).
- ansible-playbook ... --tags build,deploy,verify reports failed=0.
- Live curl /api/v1/fans/sensors returns JSON with hwmon_sensors and non-empty drives.
- Live POST /fans/profile drives-source on a real controllable fan succeeds and GET /fans shows temp_source.type==drives (or documented hw limitation); defaults restored.
- coderabbit review --agent --base main = 0 findings (or addressed).
- CHANGELOG.md Added entry under next version, written last.

**Verify:** go test ./... && make local then ansible-playbook ... --tags build,deploy,verify (failed=0) + curl /api/v1/fans/sensors + coderabbit review --agent --base main

```json:metadata
{"userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "files": ["CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./... && make local && ansible-playbook -i ansible/inventory.yml ansible/deploy.yml --tags build,deploy,verify && curl -s http://192.168.20.21:8043/api/v1/fans/sensors | head -c 2000", "acceptanceCriteria": ["go test ./... passes and make local builds", "ansible build,deploy,verify failed=0", "GET /fans/sensors returns hwmon_sensors + non-empty drives on Unraid", "live drives-source POST /fans/profile succeeds and GET /fans shows temp_source.type=drives (or documented hw limitation); defaults restored", "coderabbit review --agent --base main = 0 findings", "CHANGELOG.md Added entry written last"]}
```
